description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a high, leafy green hedge that forms a square perimeter around the property. The front features a gated entrance with a paved walkway leading to the main door, flanked by symmetrical rows of tall, narrow windows and decorative shrubs. The building itself is rectangular with a flat roof and a minimalist facade, primarily finished in white and light gray tones. The rear and side views show a continuation of the hedge boundary, with the back of the bungalow having minimal window openings and a simple, clean wall. The property includes a paved area adjacent to the house, likely serving as a driveway or patio. The overall design emphasizes privacy, clean lines, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a tall green hedge and featuring a gated entrance and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, paved walkway, symmetrical windows, and decorative shrubs leading to the main door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, paved driveway or patio area, and the hedge boundary extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain white wall with minimal window openings and the continuous hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, hedge boundary, and the side of the bungalow with limited architectural features.
